metadata.description: Mid-meeting pivot from Q4 OKRs to an active production incident. Tests Builder's handling of scope changes without losing prior context.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: We need to lock down Q4 OKRs for the data team.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Top of my list is finishing the metrics warehouse migration.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Agreed, that's KR1. What about KR2?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: I'd say latency on the analytics dashboard, getting p95 under 500ms.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Yes. Latency on dashboard p95 under 500ms is KR2.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: KR3 should be pipeline test coverage above 70%.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Sure. Pipeline test coverage above 70% as KR3.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: That gives us three solid KRs.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Hold on - Sam just messaged. Production incident.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: What's the issue?

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Customers are getting 502s from the API gateway.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: How widespread?

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: About 30% of requests according to the dashboard.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: When did it start?

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Fourteen minutes ago.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: We need someone to triage immediately.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: I can take it. I'll page the SRE team and start investigating.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Good. I'll keep our 3pm clear so you can update us.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Will do.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: OK that's enough OKRs for now. Let's reconvene tomorrow on those.

decisions.text: Q4 KR1: finish the metrics warehouse migration
Q4 KR2: analytics dashboard p95 latency under 500ms
Q4 KR3: pipeline test coverage above 70%
B will triage the API gateway 502 incident and page SRE

open_questions.text: Root cause of API gateway 502s affecting ~30% of traffic
